user.title: User
user.description: Represents an employee or administrator in the system.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth UID of the user.

role.description: Selected role (e.g. Employee, Manager, Developer, Admin).

salaryStatus.description: Status of the current salary credit.

statusDate.description: Timestamp of the last status change.

isAdmin.description: Flag indicating if the user is an administrator.

role.title: Role
role.description: A customized job role in the organization.

id.description: Short code or unique string identifier for the role.

roleName.description: The display name of the role.

createdBy.description: UID of the admin who created the role.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this role was created.

users/{userId}.description: Secure storage of employee and admin profile data.
